options.title: Shikara Ride (Dal Lake)
options.description: Sunrise rides include the floating vegetable market (before 8 AM). Book through your houseboat or at Dal Gate counter.

options.title: Gulmarg Gondola
options.description: Phase 1: Gulmarg to Kongdoori. Phase 2: Kongdoori to Apharwat Peak. Tickets at counter — arrive before 10 AM in peak season.

options.title: Guided Trek (Thajiwas / Aru)
options.description: Includes guide fee only. Pony charges extra at Sonamarg. Verify guide ID card issued by Tourism Department.

options.title: Srinagar 3N/4D Package
options.description: Typically covers houseboat, Gulmarg day trip, Mughal gardens, and airport transfer. Ask for operator registration number.

options.title: Lidder River Rafting
options.description: Seasonal — usually May to August when water levels permit. Grade II–III stretches near Pahalgam.

options.title: Houseboat Stay
options.description: Category A/B/C houseboats on Dal and Nigeen lakes. Insist on HTC registration. Meals often included — confirm in advance.
